message.content:
This is a detailed cadastral document from the Romanian company "Societatea cu Răspundere Limitată 'LANDELCAD'" (Limited Liability Company "LANDELCAD"), specifically a **"Fișă rezultatelor lucrărilor cadastrale la nivel de clădire principală"** (Cadastral Work Results Sheet at the Main Building Level). The document is structured into three main sections with extensive tabular data, providing comprehensive information about a single-family residential building. Below is a detailed breakdown of all content:


### **I. DATE GENERALE DESPRE CLĂDIRE (General Data About the Building)**
This section contains administrative and basic structural details about the building, organized in a form with labeled fields:

| Field | Label (Romanian) | Value | Description |
|-------|------------------|-------|-------------|
| 1 | Numărul cadastral (Cadastral Number) | 3 1 5 6 1 0 1 1 9 8 0 4 | Unique cadastral identifier for the property |
| 2 | Litera (Letter) | B | Building identifier (e.g., part of a complex) |
| 3 | Adresa clădirii (Building Address) | mun. Chisinau, or. Cricova, str. Vasile Alecsandri nr.19/A | Full address: Chisinau municipality, Cricova district, Vasile Alecsandri Street, No. 19/A |
| 4 | Modul de folosință (Usage Mode) | Casă de locuit individuală | Single-family residential house |
| 5 | Nr. nivelurilor (Number of Floors) | 1 | Single-story building |
| 6 | Nr. scărilor (Number of Stairs) | [Blank] | No stairs (single-story) |
| 7 | Nr. încăperilor izolate locative (Number of Isolated Livable Rooms) | [Blank] | Not specified |
| 8 | Nr. camerelor locative (Number of Livable Rooms) | 5 | Total livable rooms (e.g., bedrooms, living areas) |
| 9 | Nr. încăperilor izolate nelocative (Number of Isolated Non-Livable Rooms) | [Blank] | Not specified |
| 10 | Suprafața la sol (Ground Floor Area) | 203,2 | Total ground floor area in square meters (m²) |


### **II. DESCRIEREA GENERALĂ A CLĂDIRII (General Description of the Building)**
This section provides a tabular breakdown of the building’s components, including their area, volume, and construction details. The table has 9 columns and 3 rows (plus headers):

| Column | Label (Romanian) | Description |
|--------|------------------|-------------|
| 1 | Lit. (Letter) | Component identifier (e.g., B, b) |
| 2 | Componenta (Component) | Building part (e.g., "Partea principală" = Main Part) |
| 3 | Nr. de nivele (Number of Floors) | Floors occupied by the component |
| 4 | Modul de calcul a suprafeței exterioare (Exterior Surface Calculation Method) | Method used to calculate exterior area (e.g., "calcul analitic" = analytical calculation) |
| 5 | Suprafața exterioară (m²) (Exterior Area) | Exterior surface area in square meters |
| 6 | Înălțimea (m) (Height) | Height of the component in meters |
| 7 | Volum (m³) (Volume) | Volume of the component in cubic meters |
| 8 | Anul construcției (Construction Year) | Year the component was built |
| 9 | Mențiuni (Notes) | Additional notes (e.g., "autorizat" = authorized) |

#### **Table Rows:**
1. **Row 1 (Header):** Column labels (Lit., Componenta, Nr. de nivele, etc.).  
2. **Row 2 (Component B):**  
   - Lit.: B  
   - Componenta: Partea principală (Main Part)  
   - Nr. de nivele: 1  
   - Modul de calcul: calcul analitic (analytical calculation)  
   - Suprafața exterioară: 172,2 m²  
   - Înălțimea: 3,00 m  
   - Volum: 517,0 m³  
   - Anul construcției: 2026  
   - Mențiuni: autorizat (authorized)  
3. **Row 3 (Component b):**  
   - Lit.: b  
   - Componenta: Terasă (Terrace)  
   - Nr. de nivele: 1  
   - Modul de calcul: calcul analitic (analytical calculation)  
   - Suprafața exterioară: 31,0 m²  
   - Înălțimea: [Blank] (not specified)  
   - Volum: [Blank] (not specified)  
   - Anul construcției: 2026  
   - Mențiuni: autorizat (authorized)  

#### **Note:**  
A footnote clarifies: *"În coloana 9 din compartimentul descrierea generală a clădirii se indică mențiunea autorizat/neautorizat în cazul existenței/ipselor autorizații de construire"* (In column 9 of the general building description section, the note "authorized/unauthorized" is indicated in case of the existence/absence of construction permits).


### **III. DESCRIEREA TEHNICĂ A CLĂDIRII Lit. B (Technical Description of Building Letter B - Main Part)**
This section details the **construction elements** of the main building component (Lit. B), including materials, weights, and physical wear. The table has 7 columns and 12 rows (plus headers):

| Column | Label (Romanian) | Description |
|--------|------------------|-------------|
| 1 | Denumirea elementelor constructive (Name of Constructive Elements) | Type of building element (e.g., "Fundatii" = Foundations) |
| 2 | Descrierea elementelor constructive (Description of Constructive Elements) | Material or details (e.g., "beton armat monolit" = monolithic reinforced concrete) |
| 3 | Ponderea element, % (Element Weight, %) | Percentage weight of the element in the building (blank in this document) |
| 4 | Cota de prezență a element. (Element Presence Rate) | Presence rate of the element (blank) |
| 5 | Ponderea elementului în clădire, % (Element Weight in Building, %) | Percentage weight of the element in the entire building (blank) |
| 6 | Uzura fizică a elementului, % (Physical Wear of Element, %) | Degree of physical wear (blank) |
| 7 | Ponderea uzurii elementului în clădire, % (Wear Weight in Building, %) | Percentage of wear in the entire building (blank) |

#### **Table Rows (Constructive Elements):**
1. **Fundatii (Foundations):**  
   - Descrierea: beton armat monolit (monolithic reinforced concrete)  
2. **Pereti (Walls):**  
   - portanti (load-bearing): cărămidă BRIXTON (BRIXTON brick)  
   - despărțitori (partitions): bolțari (block walls)  
3. **Planșeu (Floor):**  
   - de pod (roof floor): beton armat monolit (monolithic reinforced concrete)  
   - intermediar (intermediate): [Blank]  
4. **Acoperiș (Roof):**  
   - bitum (bitumen)  
5. **Pardoseli (Floors):**  
   - nivelul 1 (level 1): ciment (cement)  
   - alte nivele (other levels): [Blank]  
6. **Goluri (Openings):**  
   - ferestre (windows): metaloplastic (PVC)  
   - uși (doors): lemn (wood)  
7. **Finisaj (Finishing):**  
   - interior (interior): simplu (simple)  
   - exterior (exterior): simplu (simple)  
8. **Alte lucrări (Other Works):** [Blank]  
9. **Total:** [Blank] (sum of all elements)  

#### **Calculation Note:**  
A formula is provided for calculating the building’s physical wear: *"Uzura fizică a clădirii = (col.7)*100/(col.5)"* (Physical wear of the building = (column 7) * 100 / (column 5)).  

#### **Footnote:**  
Explains that columns 2–7 are completed for accessory buildings and that physical wear is calculated for inventory purposes, per Romanian law (Hotărârea nr.156 din 15.06.1997 a Ministerului Finanțelor).


### **Execution and Verification Details**
At the bottom of the document, fields for execution and verification are filled:  
- **A executat (Executed by):** Luchianenco N. (name), 02.03.2026 (date), (signature)  
- **A verificat (Verified by):** Luchianenco N. (name), 02.03.2026 (date), (signature)  
- **Stins (data) (Cancelled (date)):** [Blank] (for the cadastral engineer’s name, first name, and signature)


### **Summary of Key Details**
- **Building Type:** Single-family residential house (Casă de locuit individuală).  
- **Location:** Chisinau, Cricova, Vasile Alecsandri Street 19/A.  
- **Structure:** Single-story (Nr. nivelurilor = 1) with 5 livable rooms (Nr. camerelor locative = 5) and a ground floor area of 203.2 m².  
- **Components:** Main part (B) and terrace (b), both built in 2026 and authorized.  
- **Materials:** Reinforced concrete (foundations, roof floor), brick (load-bearing walls), bitumen (roof), cement (floors), PVC (windows), wood (doors).  
- **Documentation:** Cadastral work executed and verified by Luchianenco N. on 02.03.2026.


This document provides a comprehensive snapshot of the building’s legal, structural, and technical characteristics, adhering to Romanian cadastral standards for property registration.
